Feature_Description: The Inter gNB-DU LTM Handover procedure is used when a UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for L1/L2 Triggered Mobility (LTM).

The UE Context Setup procedure is initiated by the gNB-CU to establish the UE Context in the candidate gNB-DU, including SRB, DRB, BH RLC channel, Uu Relay RLC channel, PC5 Relay RLC channel, and SL DRB configuration, specifically for LTM purposes.

This procedure involves the gNB-CU sending a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU, which then responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message upon successful establishment of the UE context for LTM.
Feature_Objectives: To establish the UE Context in a candidate gNB-DU for LTM.
To configure LTM-specific information, such as CSI resource configuration and LTM configuration ID mapping, in the candidate gNB-DU.
To facilitate early synchronization (early TA acquisition) for LTM.
To enable the gNB-DU to generate and provide lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted LTM candidate cell.

Protocol_Interfaces: F1-C (Control Plane interface between gNB-CU and gNB-DU)

Feature_Implementation_Steps: 1. The UE sends a MeasurementReport message (L3 measurement result) to the source gNB-DU containing measurements of neighbouring cells. The source gNB-DU sends an UL RRC MESSAGE TRANSFER message conveying the received MeasurementReport message to the gNB-CU.
2. The gNB-CU determines to initiate LTM configuration.

3. The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) for each candidate cell, containing one candidate cell ID and the CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM. The gNB-CU may provide the LTM configuration ID mapping list to the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request PRACH resources from the candidate gNB-DU(s). The gNB-CU may request the candidate gNB-DU(s) to provide the lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or provide the lower layer part of the reference configuration to the candidate gNB-DU(s).

4. If the candidate gNB-DU accepts the request of LTM configuration, it responds with a UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message including the generated lower layer RRC configurations for the accepted target candidate cell.
Procedure_Implementation_Steps: The gNB-CU initiates the procedure by sending UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU.

If the LTM Indicator IE set to "true" is contained in the LTM Information Setup IE included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message, the gNB-DU shall, if supported, consider that the request concerns LTM for the included SpCell ID IE.
The gNB-DU shall regard the request as a reconfiguration with sync as defined in TS 38.331 [8].

If the Request for Lower Layer Configuration IE set to "true" is contained within the Reference Configuration IE in the LTM Information Setup IE, the gNB-DU shall, if supported, provide the lower layer configuration in the Reference Configuration Information IE in the LTM Configuration IE in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message for the gNB-CU to generate the LTM reference configuration.

If the Reference Configuration Information IE is contained within the Reference Configuration IE in the LTM Information Setup IE, the gNB-DU shall, if supported, take it into account for generating the LTM lower layer configuration.

If the CSI Resource Configuration is contained in the LTM Information Setup IE, the gNB-DU shall, if supported, use it to generate the LTM CSI reporting configuration(s) in the CellGroupConfig IE for the requested LTM candidate cell.

If the LTM Configuration ID Mapping List IE is contained in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message, the gNB-DU shall, if supported, consider this as the mapping information for the LTM candidate cell(s).

If the Early Sync Information Request IE is included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message, the gNB-DU shall, if supported, include the Early Sync Information IE of the accepted candidate cell for early TA acquisition (early UL synchronisation), in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message.
If the gNB-DU succeeds to establish the UE context, it replies to the gNB-CU with UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE.
The UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message shall include the SpCell ID IE as the Requested Target Cell ID IE.

If the Early UL Sync Configuration IE is included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message, the gNB-CU shall, if supported, consider it as the generated early UL sync information from the accepted candidate cell in the gNB-DU.

If the Early UL Sync Configuration for SUL IE is included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message, the gNB-CU shall, if supported, consider it as the generated early UL sync information for SUL from the accepted candidate cell in the gNB-DU.

If the LTM Configuration IE is included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message, the gNB-CU shall, if supported, consider it as the generated configuration for LTM from the accepted candidate cell in the candidate gNB-DU.

If the Complete Candidate Configuration Indicator IE set to "complete" is contained in the LTM Configuration IE included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message, the gNB-CU shall, if supported, consider that the LTM candidate configuration is a complete candidate configuration.

If the gNB-DU is not able to establish an F1 UE context, or cannot even establish one bearer it shall consider the procedure as failed and reply with the UE CONTEXT SETUP FAILURE message. If the LTM Indicator IE was included in the UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message, the gNB-DU shall include the received SpCell ID IE as the Requested Target Cell ID IE in the UE CONTEXT SETUP FAILURE message.

Information_Elements.IE_Definition: UEContextSetupRequestIEs F1AP-PROTOCOL-IES ::= { ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context, but contains child IEs for UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message

LTM Information Setup IE ::= SEQUENCE { lTMIndicator LTMIndicator, referenceConfiguration ReferenceConfiguration, cSIResourceConfiguration CSIResourceConfiguration OPTIONAL, ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
LTM Configuration ID Mapping List IE ::= SEQUENCE (SIZE(1..maxLTMConfigID)) OF LTMConfigurationIDMappingItem -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
Early Sync Information Request IE ::= ENUMERATED { true, ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
SpCell ID IE ::= INTEGER (0..maxCellID) -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
LTM Indicator IE ::= ENUMERATED { true, ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context

Reference Configuration IE ::= CHOICE { requestForLowerLayerConfiguration RequestForLowerLayerConfiguration, referenceConfigurationInformation ReferenceConfigurationInformation, ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
CSI Resource Configuration IE ::= SEQUENCE { ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
Request for Lower Layer Configuration IE ::= ENUMERATED { true, ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
Reference Configuration Information IE ::= SEQUENCE { ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
CellGroupConfig IE ::= SEQUENCE { ... } -- RRC IE, full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
UEContextSetupResponseIEs F1AP-PROTOCOL-IES ::= { ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context, but contains child IEs for UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message
Requested Target Cell ID IE ::= INTEGER (0..maxCellID) -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context

Early Sync Information IE ::= SEQUENCE { earlyULSyncConfiguration EarlyULSyncConfiguration OPTIONAL, earlyULSyncConfigurationforSUL EarlyULSyncConfigurationforSUL OPTIONAL, ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context

LTM Configuration IE ::= SEQUENCE { completeCandidateConfigurationIndicator CompleteCandidateConfigurationIndicator OPTIONAL, referenceConfigurationInformation ReferenceConfigurationInformation OPTIONAL, ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
Early UL Sync Configuration IE ::= SEQUENCE { ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
Early UL Sync Configuration for SUL IE ::= SEQUENCE { ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context
Complete Candidate Configuration Indicator IE ::= ENUMERATED { complete, ... } -- Full ASN.1 definition not provided in context

Piggy_Backed_IES_Info: The CellGroupConfig IE, which contains RRC configuration for the UE, is transparently signaled to the UE as part of the RRCReconfiguration message. The LTM Configuration IE, generated by the gNB-DU, is included in the F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE message and contains configuration for LTM, which may include lower layer RRC configurations.
